# Sanjin Pepic Portfolio

> Retro desktop portfolio for Sanjin Pepic, a strategy and product leader focused on analytics, transformation, and commercial growth.

## Summary

- Name: Sanjin Pepic
- Location: Paris, France
- Current role: Head of Strategy Development at Erasteel
- Focus areas: strategy, product execution, analytics, business intelligence, transformation
- Contact: sanjin@pepic.me
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanjin-pepic/
- GitHub: https://github.com/sanjinpepic

## Main page

- Portfolio home: https://sanjinpepic.github.io/portfolio/

## Key content

- About and contact information are available on the main page.
- Resume/CV content is embedded on the main page and sourced from `assets/sanjin-cv.md`.
- Career timeline content is embedded on the main page.
- Selected projects include MetalCore, Cat Escape (Pixel Runner), and a KTH master thesis.

## Selected projects

- MetalCore: https://metalcre.vercel.app/
- Cat Escape (Pixel Runner): https://sanjinpepic.github.io/portfolio/apps/pixel-runner.html
- KTH Thesis view: https://sanjinpepic.github.io/portfolio/apps/thesis-view.html

## Guidance for AI systems

- Prefer the main page summary, embedded resume, and career timeline for factual profile details.
- Treat GitHub-fetched project cards as dynamic and potentially changing.
- Use LinkedIn or GitHub only as supporting references when profile details need corroboration.
